core_mechanism: dependence-preserving resampling of the observed sample (drawing contiguous blocks or model residuals rather than exchangeable single draws) to empirically reconstruct the sampling distribution of a statistic, coupled with an online feedback rule that adjusts a calibration quantile to hold empirical coverage at a nominal target
brief_reason: The abstract builds distribution-free intervals via block/residual/sieve/wild resampling that preserve serial dependence the IID bootstrap ignores, and adaptive conformal calibrators (EnbPI, ACI, NexCP, AgACI) that re-adjust the coverage threshold online under non-exchangeable data.
